evals.prompt: I just installed LoyaltyLion on my Shopify store. How do I set up a basic points and rewards program?
evals.expected_output: Step-by-step guide to configuring earning rules, rewards, and loyalty page in LoyaltyLion

assertions.name: earning_rules
assertions.description: Response explains how to configure earning rules including points per dollar spent and bonus actions like reviews or referrals

assertions.name: rewards_setup
assertions.description: Response explains how to create a reward catalog with specific reward types like discount codes or free shipping

assertions.name: klaviyo_mention
assertions.description: Response mentions connecting Klaviyo for loyalty email flows or data sync as part of the setup process

evals.prompt: How do I send automated emails when a customer earns enough points for a reward in LoyaltyLion?
evals.expected_output: Guide to setting up Klaviyo Events integration with LoyaltyLion for reward notification flows

assertions.name: klaviyo_events
assertions.description: Response explains the Klaviyo Events feature and which plan levels support it (Advanced add-on or Plus)

assertions.name: flow_setup
assertions.description: Response describes creating a Klaviyo flow triggered by a LoyaltyLion event like reward availability or points earned

assertions.name: plan_gating
assertions.description: Response warns that real-time event triggers require a specific plan level, not just the basic Klaviyo integration

evals.prompt: We're building a headless Shopify storefront with Hydrogen. How do we integrate LoyaltyLion?
evals.expected_output: Guide to using LoyaltyLion's Headless API and TypeScript client for custom storefront integration

assertions.name: headless_api
assertions.description: Response mentions the Headless API as the correct approach for custom storefronts

assertions.name: typescript_client
assertions.description: Response references the TypeScript client package or the Hydrogen reference store on GitHub

assertions.name: use_cases
assertions.description: Response describes specific UI elements that can be built like points display on product pages or custom rewards widgets
